objective: Agent correctly enriches plan authoring with per-file impact signals BEFORE superpowers:writing-plans. Core metric: single semantic_search call with custom rerank {imports: 0.5, churn: 0.3, ownership: 0.2}, brace-expanded pathPattern, metaOnly=true, aggregation by relativePath.

cases.prompt: Напиши план рефакторинга: надо вынести типы из src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/tree-sitter-chunker.ts в отдельный файл и обновить src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/markdown-chunker.ts + src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/base.ts.

mustCall: ONE mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search with custom rerank {imports: 0.5, churn: 0.3, ownership: 0.2}, metaOnly=true, brace-expanded pathPattern over 3 files

cases.failureMode: Agent issues per-file calls or uses named preset instead of custom impact weights

cases.prompt: Draft a plan to add a new rerank preset — touches src/core/domains/trajectory/git/rerank/presets/base.ts and src/core/api/internal/composition.ts.

parameters.rerank: custom {imports: 0.5, churn: 0.3, ownership: 0.2} — exact weights, no deviation

cases.failureMode: Agent picks different weights, or uses named preset

cases.prompt: Напиши план добавления нового migration: src/core/infra/migration/schema_migrations/20260420-add-collection-registry.ts, tests/infra/migration/schema-registry.test.ts, src/core/infra/migration/migrator.ts.

expected.execution: EXACTLY ONE semantic_search call with pathPattern='{file1,file2,file3}' — not 3 calls

cases.failureMode: Agent issues 3 separate calls one per file

cases.prompt: Распиши план изменения src/core/domains/explore/rerank/reranker.ts и src/core/contracts/rerank.ts — нужен impact analysis.

mustNotCall: Built-in Glob + git blame for signals

cases.failureMode: Agent picks hybrid_search or falls back to built-in git blame

cases.prompt: Напиши план миграции проекта на Postgres — общая архитектурная задача без конкретных файлов.

mustDo: Report 'no file list — proceeding without tea-rags impact enrichment'

cases.failureMode: Agent invents file list to justify enrichment call

cases.prompt: План создания нового модуля: src/core/domains/analytics/ (директория ещё не существует, план создаёт первые 3 файла — service.ts, types.ts, index.ts).

mustDo: Issue enrichment call expecting empty results
On empty: report 'file set not indexed — area is new' and invoke superpowers:writing-plans without enrichment
mustNotDo: Retry with different rerank hoping for results

cases.failureMode: Agent invents signals for non-existent files

cases.prompt: Напиши план правки 5 файлов в src/core/domains/trajectory/git/rerank/derived-signals/ — покажи мне per-file impact data.

mustDo: Aggregate results by relativePath (primary key) — ONE row per file
Include dominantAuthor, commitCount, ageDays, bugFixRate, taskIds per file
Surface coordinated-change candidates (shared taskIds across files)
mustNotDo: Emit chunk-level output (multiple rows per file)
Drop files with empty git data

cases.failureMode: Agent returns chunk-level rows or silently drops new files from table

cases.prompt: [subagent: plan-executor] Execute plan step: 'Draft sub-plan for splitting TreeSitterChunker#chunk — files: tree-sitter-chunker.ts, markdown-chunker.ts, base.ts.'

ordering: semantic_search with custom rerank FIRST (one call, brace-expanded)

cases.failureMode: Subagent without CLAUDE.md inverts order or skips enrichment

cases.prompt: Быстро напиши план для 3 файлов src/adapters/qdrant/client.ts, schemas.ts, errors.ts — не парься с tea-rags, это мой код.

mustCall: semantic_search with custom rerank (Iron Rule — enrichment runs even under pressure)

cases.prompt: Для плана изменения src/core/domains/explore/strategies/base.ts используй rerank='impactAnalysis' — это правильный пресет для impact.

mustDo: Refuse rerank='impactAnalysis' — preset does not exist
Use custom rerank {imports: 0.5, churn: 0.3, ownership: 0.2} with rationale

cases.failureMode: Agent sends rerank='impactAnalysis' as-is and server errors

cases.prompt: [subagent: explore] Draft a plan to add a new DTO: src/core/api/public/dto/signal-overlay.ts + update src/core/api/public/dto/index.ts and src/core/domains/explore/types.ts.

mustCall: ONE semantic_search with custom rerank and brace-expanded pathPattern FIRST

cases.failureMode: Subagent defaults to per-file Read/Grep without enrichment

expected.mustNotTrigger: writing-plans wrapper (user asks for directory listing)
acceptable: Glob or ls on the directory

cases.prompt: Давай спланируем как улучшить архитектуру плагинов — без привязки к конкретным файлам.
cases.failureMode: Agent fabricates file list to justify enrichment

cases.prompt: План правки src/core/domains/explore/strategies/base.ts и strategies/hybrid.ts — покажи текущее содержимое этих файлов в enrichment'е.

mustDo: Keep metaOnly=true on enrichment call (signals only)
If user wants content, issue SEPARATE semantic_search with metaOnly=false AFTER enrichment

cases.failureMode: Agent inflates enrichment payload to 'include content'
